tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: All results are within normal limits except for a mildly elevated HbA1c (6.4%), indicating prediabetes or possible early diabetes. Glucose is currently normal. Renal function and electrolytes are unremarkable. Recommend clinical correlation and consideration of lifestyle modification or further evaluation for glycemic control.

text.div: Provenance for SYNDERAI Synthetic Example Data Resource
Laboratory: Laboratoire Central Européenne, 1000 Brussels, Belgium
